backend/main.mo: Actor implementing access control, user profiles, Stripe configuration, and payment session validation using multiple utility modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing modifications to ProjectsPage.tsx, including removing a project and adding a new TeleMeetUp card.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted list of brief summaries for various frontend files describing their roles and UI behavior.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML shell that loads the React application via main.tsx into the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with all application routes including the new Sign Up page inside the Layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with TMU branding, quick links, and social icons, styled with dark theme.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with navigation links, responsive mobile menu, and action buttons routing to Sign Up and home.
Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/HeroIllustration: Renders an animated network-style SVG illustration with colored nodes arranged in a circle around a glowing central hexagon.
frontend/src/components/IoMPopup.tsx: Displays a styled scrollable dialog showing dynamic titled content sections with customizable colors.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the top-level page layout with header, footer, and routed main content area.
frontend/src/components/TMUIRESPopup.tsx: Shows a full-screen modal with title, description, and external resource links including documentation, video, and more.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, refreshing dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and utilities for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity loading.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Wraps backend actor calls in React Query hooks for fetching user profiles and static resource content.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base layers and custom CSS variables for the app's color system and text gradients.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root component.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the homepage with a hero section, IoM popup content, and navigation, using badges, cards, and illustrations.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectsPage.tsx: Displays a list of static project cards with descriptions, media links, and optional popups, using fetched TMU-IRES content.
frontend/src/pages/ResourcePage.tsx: Shows resources and documentation including architecture diagrams and user guides fetched from an API.
frontend/src/pages/RoadMapPage.tsx: Presents a multi-phase roadmap with progress, milestones, and targets using static phase data.
frontend/src/pages/SignUpPage.tsx: Provides signup and token purchase UI with form handling, amount validation, and fee calculations.
frontend/src/pages/TokenomicsPage.tsx: Renders the Tokenomics page with supply info, staking tiers, and styled feature sections using Cards and icons.
frontend/src/pages/Web2Web3BridgePage.ts: Displays a list of Web2-to-Web3 use cases with selectable popups detailing benefits, concerns, and token use.
frontend/src/pages/WhitePaperPage.tsx: Implements the White Paper page with scroll-based section highlighting, navigation sidebar, media buttons, and detailed content sections.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters using query strings, hash routing, and sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures TailwindCSS theme extensions, colors, animations, and plugins for the frontend.
project_state.json: Tracks current project state, requested features, and required updates for the site’s pages and components.
